name: Cinematic Camera
author: TransitCore
description:
Record keyframe-based cinematic flythroughs of your Subway Builder city. 
Set keyframes at any camera position, zoom, pitch, and bearing, then play them back as a smooth animated sequence. 
Choose from 5 transition types (Fly, Both Ease, Ease In, Ease Out, Linear), customize duration per keyframe, and save up to 3 shots for quick recall. 
Zen mode hides all game UI during playback for clean screen recording, with loop mode for continuous playback and Escape to stop anytime.

Neat Trick - Select a route before playing in zen mode and playback will only highlight that route.
